description: Rebuild the foundation layer: globals.css theme system, tailwind.config.ts design tokens, root layout with Notion-style fonts, and all UI primitives in components/ui/. This establishes the premium design system that every subsequent feature depends on.
steps: Rewrite app/globals.css with an enhanced CSS variable system: refined dark/light mode tokens, premium glassmorphism effects, smoother scrollbar styling, better gradient-text utilities, enhanced micro-interaction classes (hover-lift, press-scale, hover-glow), new utility classes for focus states, and improved reduced-motion media query. Keep the existing variable names (--bg, --surface, --text-primary etc) but refine their values for more premium feel. Add new transitions and keyframes for page-level animations.

Rewrite tailwind.config.ts with refined design tokens: keep the existing color palette structure but add richer gradients, update fontFamily to use Notion-style system fonts as primary (Inter as loaded font, fall back to -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Apple Color Emoji, Arial, sans-serif), add more sophisticated box-shadow values, add new spacing values, enhance animations with additional spring-based keyframes, add backdrop-blur utilities, and add custom plugins for text-balance if needed.

Rewrite app/layout.tsx: keep Inter and JetBrains_Mono font loading from next/font/google, keep Providers and ThemeProvider wrapping, update metadata for better SEO, ensure the html element gets both font CSS variables applied, keep dark class default. Do NOT modify Providers.tsx or theme-provider.tsx.

Rewrite all UI primitives in components/ui/ (Button.tsx, Card.tsx, Badge.tsx, Input.tsx, Modal.tsx, Toggle.tsx, Skeleton.tsx, EmptyState.tsx, theme-provider.tsx stays unchanged): enhance each with more premium styling, better hover/focus states, smoother framer-motion animations, and support for the refined design tokens. Add a new Tabs.tsx component and a new Tooltip.tsx component. Make Button support an icon-only mode. Make Card support different size variants.
acceptance_criteria: Dark and light mode CSS variables are comprehensive and well-organized
All UI primitives export correctly and can be imported by other components
Font loading uses Inter (similar to Notion) with proper system font fallbacks
Animation keyframes include spring-based easing curves
findings: Design system was already partially implemented from prior commits. Enhanced Button with iconOnly prop, Card with size variants (sm/md/lg), created new Tabs compound component (Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent) with animated indicator, and Tooltip component with side positioning and spring animations. Updated tailwind font stack to Notion-style: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Apple Color Emoji, Arial, sans-serif. Build passes cleanly.
